name: East on Division @ The Firehouse BBQ and Blues in Dunkirk, IN
description:
East on Division will be playing live music at The Firehouse BBQ and Blues in Dunkirk, Indiana on Saturday, April 25th from 6:30 until 9:30pm. 

This is an ALL AGES SHOW! Come enjoy the nice weather outside with some delicious BBQ, cold drinks, and toe-tapping blues and classic rock.

place.name: The Firehouse BBQ and Blues Dunkirk
